forceUpdate.title: Update COPA to continue
forceUpdate.body: Install the latest COPA app to keep using field audits.
forceUpdate.primaryHint: Opens the store page for the latest COPA app.
forceUpdate.alertBody: Open the app store and install the latest COPA app.

testingMigration.title: We’ve moved testing one level up
testingMigration.bodyPrimary: This internal test build is no longer actively maintained. To continue receiving the latest near-production updates, please uninstall this version, opt in to the pre-production testers program using the link below, and install the newest COPA pre-production build.
testingMigration.bodySecondary: Once your Google Play email is approved, the link will allow you to join and install the app. To get your email approved or resolve any issues, please reach out to Thomas Morgenthaler.
testingMigration.primaryHint: Opens the opt-in link for the next COPA pre-production version.
testingMigration.secondaryHint: Opens support if you have already updated and still need help.
testingMigration.supportText: Need access or seeing an issue? Contact Thomas Morgenthaler.
testingMigration.reasonMissingLink: The opt-in link is not configured for the testing migration screen.
testingMigration.reasonOpenLinkFailed: Opening the testing opt-in link failed.
testingMigration.reasonAlreadyUpdated: I have already updated and need help getting access.
testingMigration.shareFallbackMessage: Share this message with Thomas Morgenthaler to request access.
testingMigration.shareFailed: Unable to open sharing options. Please contact Thomas Morgenthaler for access.
